name: research-tools
description: Research skills and MCP servers for PaperRead drafts and reviews, paper-library intake, Zotero, public paper search, clean web-page extraction, quality-first local document extraction, and source-backed LLM Wiki maintenance.

interface.description: Create and review PaperRead notes, manage paper intake, and use source-backed research tools.
interface.shortDescription: PaperRead draft and review, paper intake, web, local document, and LLM Wiki tools.
interface.longDescription: Research Tools packages lightweight PaperRead draft and source-backed review workflows for Obsidian notes, a Zotero-first paper-library intake workflow, paper-search MCP, Zotero MCP, Defuddle web extraction, quality-first local MinerU document extraction, and the Research LLM Wiki workflow for source-backed Obsidian research synthesis.
defaultPrompt: Use $paper-read-draft to start a note, $paper-read-review to annotate it, or $paper-library-intake for library work.
Extract a complex local document with checksum-verified MinerU outputs.
Use the Research LLM Wiki to ingest, query, or lint my research vault wiki.
